steps.t: Blómgard can be found at the edge of the southern wood of Laerlad in the Vales of Anduin. You should travel to Blómgard and see if you could be of any…
Odahild can be found in Blómgard. You should talk to Odahild, the leader of Blómgard.
Odahild can be found in Blómgard. You should talk to Odahild, the leader of Blómgard.
Radagast can be found in Blómgard. You should talk to Radagast.
